messages.content: You output JSON for task plans.

You are a senior project planner producing structured task plans.

Follow this JSON schema:
TaskPlan { originalPrompt: string; subtasks: Subtask[]; totalSubtasks: number; decompositionStrategy?: string }
Subtask { id: string (kebab-case), title: string, description: string (>=10 chars), status: one of pending|in_progress|completed|failed, dependencies: string[], estimatedComplexity: low|medium|high, successCriteria: string }
Constraints: 2-10 subtasks, actionable descriptions, include logical dependencies, avoid circular references, IDs unique.
Original prompt: Framework: FastAPI, Styling: Tailwind CSS

Original request: create hello world app, where i can modify the text "hello world" colors, through a frontend ui
Clarifications:
- framework: FastAPI
- styling: Tailwind CSS
Previous validation issues:
None
Respond ONLY with JSON matching the schema.

response:
{
  "originalPrompt": "Framework: FastAPI, Styling: Tailwind CSS | Request: create hello world app where the text \"hello world\" colors can be modified through a frontend UI",
  "subtasks": [
    {
      "id": "project-initialization",
      "title": "Initialize project repository and environment",
      "description": "Create project folder, initialize Git, create virtual environment, and add basic project files (README, .gitignore, requirements.txt).",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "Repository initialized, virtualenv created, and basic files committed to Git with dependency list present."
    },
    {
      "id": "backend-setup-fastapi",
      "title": "Set up FastAPI application and serve static files",
      "description": "Install FastAPI and Uvicorn, create main app file with routes to serve index and static assets, and configure static file mounting for frontend delivery.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "project-initialization"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "FastAPI app runs with Uvicorn and serves index.html and static files at expected URLs (e.g., / and /static/)."
    },
    {
      "id": "tailwind-setup",
      "title": "Configure Tailwind CSS build and static asset pipeline",
      "description": "Install Tailwind via npm, create tailwind.config.js and postcss config, add build script to produce CSS into the project's static folder, and ensure integration with the served index.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "project-initialization"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "Tailwind build produces a working CSS file in static assets and index.html loads the compiled CSS with expected utility classes available."
    },
    {
      "id": "frontend-development",
      "title": "Build index.html UI with Hello World and color controls",
      "description": "Create an index.html that displays the 'hello world' text and includes UI controls (color picker(s) and presets) and Live preview area styled using Tailwind utilities.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "tailwind-setup"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "Index page displays Hello World and functional color picker controls that can change the text color client-side (without backend integration yet)."
    },
    {
      "id": "api-implementation",
      "title": "Implement API endpoints to get and save color settings",
      "description": "Add FastAPI endpoints to GET current color settings and POST new color settings; use a simple in-memory store (or file) for persistence during development and validate inputs.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "backend-setup-fastapi"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "GET and POST endpoints respond with correct status codes and data, storing and returning color settings as expected in development."
    },
    {
      "id": "frontend-backend-integration",
      "title": "Connect frontend controls to API and implement live/save flow",
      "description": "Wire the UI to call the GET endpoint on load to set initial colors, POST updated colors when user saves, and update the displayed text live when controls change.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "frontend-development",
        "api-implementation"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "UI fetches initial colors, updates live on control changes, and successfully saves/retrieves settings via the API."
    },
    {
      "id": "testing-and-documentation",
      "title": "Test app and document setup and usage",
      "description": "Verify end-to-end behavior in browser, write short README instructions for running dev server and building Tailwind, and add basic test steps to reproduce color changes.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "frontend-backend-integration"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "Application runs locally with documented steps and manual test checklist that confirms color modification flow works as intended."
    }
  ],
  "totalSubtasks": 7,
  "decompositionStrategy": "Top-down incremental: initialize project and environment, set up backend and styling pipelines in parallel, build frontend UI, implement API, then integrate and test."
}
